message:
refactor: use hashmap_helper.StringHashMap for consistent wyhash performance

Converts all std.StringHashMap usages to hashmap_helper.StringHashMap
which uses wyhash (same as Bun) for faster string key lookups.

Files updated:
- src/edgebox_wamr.zig - module cache
- src/host/stdlib.zig - map handles
- src/freeze/frozen_registry.zig - name collision tracking
- src/freeze/verify_opcodes.zig - opcode verification
- src/abi/simd_json.zig - JSON object parsing
- src/wizer_wamr.zig - global name indexing
- src/component/native_registry.zig - implementation registry

Also fixes API differences: fetchRemove -> fetchSwapRemove for ArrayHashMap.
